item.title: Rust eBooks Nightly — Rust books in EPUB, AZW3, MOBI, and PDF
item.description: Artur Sulej's project that automatically builds and publishes the latest versions of top Rust books as eBooks. Updated daily.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: sem: Semantic Version Control
item.description: Discovering sem, a CLI tool that understands your code's semantics and tells you what entities changed, not just what lines.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: kitty-rbw: Fast Bitwarden access from your kitty terminal
item.description: Introducing kitty-rbw, a "kitten" for the kitty terminal that allows you to search and use rbw (Bitwarden) credentials instantly using fzf.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: rbw: The Bitwarden terminal client you should be using
item.description: How to install and configure rbw, a Rust implementation of the Bitwarden client, and how to integrate it into your workflows with pi-agent.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro

item.title: broot, a different way to navigate your directories
item.description: broot is a terminal tool for interactive directory exploration with fuzzy search, multiple panels, and file preview.
item.dc:creator: Pablo Caro
